examples: An improbable sort of barque, but at least it floats.
One, an old barque, had been big enough for a sub to bother with and the sub had shelled her.
This is a stormy economic world, and an independent Scotland would be a small, vulnerable barque.
But since the US can print its own money, it could bail without sinking its own barque.
When they are twenty feet from the jetty, a small plane appears and swoops down over the barque.
